items.prompt: In tar czf archive.tar.gz dir/, the z flag means…
items.explain: z enables gzip; c=create, f=file (archive name).

items.prompt: zip -r packs a directory tree recursively; unzip -l lists a zip without extracting.

choices: You only use Linux and never share
Sharing with Windows users who expect a .zip
You need to disable compression always
You want to edit binary ELF files in place
items.explain: zip is the common cross-platform handoff format.
